body_txt: These are the inhabitants of Quirky Town , a selection of several Stock Characters . They're goofy, quirky , friendly, and ultimately harmless. There will be one or two "sane" people (protagonists included) and at least one sourpuss and a Tall, Dark, and Snarky townsperson to complain about this idyllic place. And it is idyllic . It would take a town of Stepford Smiler clones to approach the non-existent level of crime and unemployment these towns have. If they are related, they are a Quirky Household . Wacky Homeroom is the school equivalent.
